scripts.db:pre: npm run db:up && npm run db:wait
scripts.dev:apps: concurrently -n API,PATIENT,PRO,ADMIN -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev:patient" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev:professional" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all:apps: concurrently -n API,LAND_FINAL,LAND_ALT1,LAND_ALT2,PAT_MOB,PATIENT,PRO,ADMIN -c cyan,green,blue,magenta,white,gray,red,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:patient-landing" "npm run dev:patient-landing-v2" "npm run dev:landing" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev:patient-mobile" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev:patient" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev:professional" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:landings: concurrently -n LAND_FINAL,LAND_ALT1,LAND_ALT2 -c green,blue,magenta "npm run dev:patient-landing" "npm run dev:patient-landing-v2" "npm run dev:landing"
scripts.dev: npm run db:pre && npm run dev:apps
scripts.dev:all: npm run db:pre && npm run dev:all:apps
scripts.db:up: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d mysql redis
scripts.db:sync: npm run db:up && npm run db:wait && npm run db:push
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @therapy/types && npm run prisma:generate:api && npm run build -w @therapy/api
scripts.build:admin: npm run build -w @therapy/types && npm run build -w @therapy/admin
scripts.build:patient: npm run build -w @therapy/types && npm run build -w @therapy/patient
scripts.build:professional: npm run build -w @therapy/types && npm run build -w @therapy/professional
